meta.title: ARDICTECH — AI-Powered Digital Transformation for Manufacturing
meta.description: Transform your factory floor into an intelligent, data-driven operation. Proven 40% efficiency gains at scale across 16 factories.

slides.headline: The Sentient Factory.
slides.description: Your factory is no longer a collection of machines. We bridge the gap between raw industrial data and digital consciousness, turning every sensor into a voice.

slides.headline: CWF: Chat With Your Factory
slides.description: If you could speak to your infrastructure, what would it say? Our conversational AI turns complex telemetry into simple human dialogue.

valueFirst.title: Where Should Digital Deliver Value First?
valueFirst.subtitle: Stop Guessing. Start Sensing. We audit your 'Dark Data' to find millions in addressable losses before we propose a single architecture change.

cards.title: Eliminate Hidden Losses
cards.description: Expose the 'Hidden Factory' by surfacing micro-stops and speed losses that paper logs miss. Typically recovers $8M-$12M in previously dark data loss.

cards.title: Reduce Quality Drift
cards.description: Identify and eliminate quality variations before they impact yield. Real-time monitoring surfaces defects that traditional QC processes miss, typically improving yield by 15-25%.

cards.title: Optimize Energy BOM
cards.description: Reduce energy consumption and material waste through intelligent resource allocation. Typically achieves 20-30% reduction in energy costs and 10-15% reduction in material waste.

cards.title: Sync Lead Times
cards.description: Synchronize production schedules with demand signals to eliminate bottlenecks and reduce lead times. Typically reduces lead times by 25-35% while improving on-time delivery.

untappedPotential.subtitle: The Silent Factory costs you millions. We give it a voice.

cards.title: Dark Data Loss
cards.quote: Valuable signals are trapped in legacy silos. We unlock this 'Dark Data' for production truth.

cards.title: Reactive Maintenance
cards.quote: Recovering hidden capacity lost to micro-stoppages that traditional systems cannot see.

cards.title: Quality Escapes
cards.quote: Eliminating batch variations and quality defects through real-time prescriptive adjustments.

cards.title: OEE Uplift
cards.quote: Converting operational efficiency directly into margin expansion via waste reduction and energy optimization.

journeyState.question: Which State Are You In?
journeyState.title: The Path To Digitalization Is Rarely Straight

states.title: The Searcher
states.description: Overwhelmed by buzzwords (AI, IIoT, 4.0) but unsure where to start.

states.title: The Pilot Prisoner
states.description: Successful pilot that failed to scale. 70% of initiatives die here.

states.title: The Restart
states.description: Tried, failed, burned budget. Now skeptical of 'blackbox' solutions.

nodes.label: Node A. The Search
nodes.description: Exploring options, defining the problem and potential ROI.

nodes.label: Node B. The Plan
nodes.description: Building the business case, allocating budget, facing internal hurdles.

nodes.label: Node C. The Push
nodes.description: A project is underway but struggling to scale or show enterprise-wide value.

nodes.label: Node D. The Pilot Trap
nodes.description: A successful proof-of-concept that never moved into full production.

nodes.label: Node E. The False Start
nodes.description: A previous initiative failed due to complexity, cost, or lack of adoption.

operationalEnso.title: Complete And Incomplete At The Same Time
operationalEnso.description: A factory is not a destination; it's a living feedback loop. We build systems that perceive, learn, and grow.
operationalEnso.tagline: The Sentient Factory: Alive, Evolving and Always in Motion.
operationalEnso.hover: In the Sentient Factory, every node is connected. The Ensō represents the seamless flow of intelligence from edge to core, turning raw data into conscious action.
operationalEnso.definition: Enso is a hand-drawn circle in Japanese Zen art, a simple shape with a deep message: presence, clarity, and the idea that everything is connected.

ensoApproach.title: Connect & Enhance — Don't Replace
ensoApproach.description: The Intelligence Overlay: Evolution, Not Revolution. Our intelligence wrapper reads from your existing systems through secure APIs, building a unified data lake without disrupting operations.

features.title: 4-Layer Architecture
features.description: From edge to insight, a complete stack built for manufacturing reality.

features.title: Non-Disruptive Overlay
features.description: Connect and enhance — never replace your existing systems.

features.title: Chat With Your Factory
features.description: Ask questions in natural language. Get answers with live metric charts.

features.title: Time To Value: Weeks
features.description: Proof of value in 8-12 weeks, not years of traditional consulting.

platform.title: Complete Manufacturing Intelligence Platform
platform.subtitle: Our 4-layer architecture bridges the gap between raw data and conscious manufacturing action.

layers.name: IoT-IGNITE
layers.description: The foundation of the sentient factory. Connects to any industrial endpoint, from legacy PLCs to modern sensors, capturing high-fidelity telemetry at scale.

layers.name: ArMES / MOM
layers.description: The nervous system of production. Orchestrates real-time operations, tracks every movement on the floor, and ensures process compliance across facilities.

layers.name: ArAI
layers.description: The cognitive intelligence layer. Analyzes patterns to predict downtime, optimize energy recipes, and identify quality drift before it impacts yield.

layers.name: CWF
layers.description: The conversational interface. A generative AI wrapper that allows stakeholders to interrogate production data using natural human language.

caseStudy.title: Transforming Europe's 4th Largest Ceramics Manufacturer
caseStudy.subtitle: How a leading European ceramics manufacturer achieved measurable results across 16 factories with the ARDICTECH platform.
caseStudy.challenge: This manufacturer faced critical challenges with manual production monitoring, inconsistent quality across factories, and delayed response to equipment issues. Data silos prevented cross-factory visibility, making strategic decisions slow and reactive.
caseStudy.solution: ARDICTECH deployed its full platform stack across all 16 factories, integrating IoT sensors with existing equipment, implementing real-time quality monitoring, and enabling predictive maintenance through AI-driven analytics.

quote.text: ARDICTECH transformed how we see and manage our production. For the first time, we have real-time visibility across all 16 factories from a single dashboard.
quote.author: Manufacturing Director

roi.title: Calculate Your ROI
roi.subtitle: See how much your operation could save with ARDICTECH. Adjust the sliders to match your facility.
roi.disclaimer: * Estimates based on industry averages from manufacturing clients. Actual results vary by facility, implementation scope, and operational maturity.

features.title: Everything You Need To Modernize Manufacturing
features.subtitle: Eight core capabilities that work together to transform your production floor.

items.title: Real-time Production Monitoring
items.description: Track every production line, machine, and operator in real-time. Get instant alerts when KPIs deviate from targets.

items.title: Predictive Maintenance
items.description: AI models analyze vibration, temperature, and operational patterns to predict equipment failures before they happen.

items.title: Quality Control Automation
items.description: Automated inspection and defect detection powered by computer vision. Catch quality issues at the source, not the end of the line.

items.title: Energy Consumption Optimization
items.description: Monitor and optimize energy usage across your facilities. Identify waste patterns and reduce costs with AI-driven recommendations.

items.title: Conversational Factory Interface
items.description: Ask your factory questions in natural language. CWF turns complex data queries into simple conversations for faster decisions.

items.title: Cross-Factory Analytics
items.description: Compare performance across all your facilities in a unified dashboard. Identify best practices and replicate success.

items.title: Legacy System Integration
items.description: Connect with existing PLCs, SCADA, ERP, and MES systems. No rip-and-replace — we work with what you have.

items.title: Mobile-First Access
items.description: Full platform access from any device. Managers and operators stay connected to the factory floor from anywhere.

techStack.title: Enterprise-Grade Technology
techStack.subtitle: Built on proven, scalable infrastructure trusted by the world's leading manufacturers.

layers.name: Edge Layer
layers.description: IoT devices, sensors, and gateways for data collection at the source.

layers.name: Data Layer
layers.description: High-performance storage and processing for time-series and operational data.

layers.name: AI Layer
layers.description: Machine learning models for prediction, optimization, and anomaly detection.

layers.name: Application Layer
layers.description: Modern web and mobile interfaces with robust API integrations.
